articles.author: Sarah Atwood
articles.title: Paige Shiver reveals abortion, 'open secret' relationship with Sherrone Moore - The Detroit News
articles.description: Paige Shiver, former assistant to Sherrone Moore, revealed details of their "open secret" relationship on "Good Morning America."
articles.content: Paige Shiver, the former executive assistant to former University of Michigan head football coach Sherrone Moore, opened up about their relationship in a 5-minute segment Friday on ABC's "Good Mornin… [+362 chars]
